rationale: Stage 2 migration is structurally sound: `CompareRuntime` introduced in compare_adapter.go embedding AgentRunRuntime, dispatch site in agent_cmd.go now routes through `config.LoadAndResolve` + `RunCompareWithConfigViaService`, and `BenchmarkArmsToCompare` no longer uses the struct literal. New behavioral test exercises the migrated path end-to-end. AC1 verified directly; AC2 trusted from commit evidence.
